description: Minimum 44x44px touch targets per WCAG 2.5.5
do: Use minHeight: 44 and minWidth: 44 for all interactive elements
dont: Don't use small tap targets under 44px — causes misclicks on mobile

description: All interactive elements must have accessible labels
do: Add aria-label or accessibilityLabel to icon buttons and images
dont: Don't use empty buttons or images without alt text

description: Mobile screens in sunlight need higher contrast
do: Use 7:1 contrast ratio for outdoor-use apps
dont: Don't rely on subtle color differences for critical information

description: Haptic feedback confirms actions without visual dependency
do: Use haptic feedback for success/error states and toggles
dont: Don't overuse haptics — reserve for meaningful interactions

description: Swipe gestures need discoverable alternatives
do: Provide visible buttons alongside swipe actions
dont: Don't hide critical actions behind undiscoverable gestures

description: Standard mobile pattern for refreshing content
do: Implement pull-to-refresh on list views with loading indicator
dont: Don't use pull-to-refresh on non-list views or forms

description: Long press actions need visual cues
do: Show a subtle press indicator and provide alternative access via icon
dont: Don't make long press the only way to access actions

description: Bottom sheets are thumb-friendly on large phones
do: Use bottom sheets for contextual menus and pickers
dont: Don't use full-screen modals for simple selections

description: Bottom tab bar is the primary mobile navigation
do: Limit to 5 tabs maximum with clear icons and labels
dont: Don't use more than 5 tabs or icon-only tabs without labels

description: Predictable back behavior prevents user frustration
do: Support hardware back button and gesture-based back navigation
dont: Don't override system back behavior unexpectedly

description: Deep links must resolve to correct screen state
do: Implement universal links (iOS) and app links (Android)
dont: Don't break deep links when refactoring navigation

description: Search should be prominent on content-heavy apps
do: Place search in header or as first scrollable element
dont: Don't bury search in hamburger menus on content apps

description: Correct keyboard type reduces input friction
do: Use email keyboard for email fields numeric for phone numbers
dont: Don't use default keyboard for specialized input types

description: Auto-scroll to focused field prevents content hiding
do: Scroll form field into view above keyboard when focused
dont: Don't let keyboard cover active input fields

description: Real-time validation reduces form abandonment
do: Validate on blur and show inline error messages
dont: Don't wait until form submission to show all errors

description: Auto-fill reduces typing on small keyboards
do: Support auto-fill for name email address and payment fields
dont: Don't disable auto-fill or use custom input implementations that break it

description: Mobile networks require optimized image loading
do: Use responsive images with srcset and lazy loading
dont: Don't load full-resolution images on mobile connections

description: Content placeholders reduce perceived load time
do: Show skeleton screens that match actual content layout
dont: Don't use generic spinners for content-heavy screens

description: Mobile users frequently lose connectivity
do: Cache critical data and show offline state gracefully
dont: Don't show blank screens or error pages when offline

description: Janky animations feel worse on mobile
do: Use transform and opacity for animations — they're GPU accelerated
dont: Don't animate layout properties like width height or margin

description: Body text under 16px causes zoom on iOS Safari
do: Use minimum 16px body text and 14px for secondary text
dont: Don't use body text smaller than 14px on mobile

description: Optimal mobile reading requires shorter line lengths
do: Target 35-50 characters per line on mobile screens
dont: Don't let text span the full width on tablets without max-width

description: iOS Dynamic Type respects user accessibility preferences
do: Support Dynamic Type scaling for all text elements
dont: Don't use fixed font sizes that ignore system settings

description: Notches and home indicators need safe area handling
do: Use safe area insets for all edge content
dont: Don't place interactive elements in unsafe areas near notch or home bar

description: Some users rotate devices — handle it gracefully
do: Support landscape or lock orientation explicitly
dont: Don't let layout break in landscape without explicitly locking portrait

description: Lower screen areas are easiest to reach with one hand
do: Place primary actions in the bottom third of the screen
dont: Don't put frequently used actions at the top of the screen

description: Cards are the standard mobile content container
do: Use cards with consistent padding radius and shadow from design tokens
dont: Don't use bare content blocks without visual grouping on mobile

description: Status bar should match app theme for polished feel
do: Set status bar style to match current screen background color
dont: Don't use light status bar on light backgrounds — text becomes invisible

description: Every async action needs a loading state
do: Show contextual loading indicators near the trigger action
dont: Don't use full-screen blocking loaders for partial content updates

description: First-time and zero-data screens need guidance
do: Design empty states with illustration action button and clear message
dont: Don't show blank screens — always provide next-step guidance
